rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the target component or implementation scope, following the KSYN-2 pattern
Use only visible identifiers in component type annexes, following the KSYN-1 pattern
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex, following the KDEF-3 pattern
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL architecture by maintaining valid component and implementation scopes
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations, following the KDEF-1 pattern
Align helper declaration types with expression types, following the KDEF-2 pattern
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use the pattern `annex agree {** ... **};`
Component type annexes contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes contain implementation-level bindings like assignments
anti_patterns: Avoid using subcomponent paths in component type annexes, following the KDEF-3 pattern
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types in declarations, following the KDEF-1 pattern
Do not mix incompatible types in expressions, following the KDEF-2 pattern
